reasoning: As of late October 2025, just three weeks before the November 16 election, polling indicates Johannes Kaiser is in third place. The latest Cadem poll (Oct 26) shows him at 15%, having just surpassed Evelyn Matthei (14%), but still significantly trailing the frontrunners Jeannette Jara (~26%) and José Antonio Kast (~22-23%). To resolve as YES, Kaiser must receive the greatest number of valid votes in the first round. Given the ~11-point deficit and the short timeframe remaining, overcoming the two leading candidates is highly improbable, making his chances of finishing first extremely low.
